text.message: Henk? I don't get Ur picks
bue needs 1 more rock for 2nd cit beware
yellow's hold on road is very tenuous
we can check dice stats after
thanks for giving me double 8 Henkvd
that you may remember and be confounded, and never open your mouth again because of your shame, when I atone for you for all that you have done, declares the Lord God
